reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Rooms were not what it was on app

reviews.title: The Best place I have found in all Noida so far
Great hospitality
reviews.text: The entire hotel was clean and well maintained, with the rooms being comfortable and tidy. The restaurant food was delicious and staff was very hospitable. It was in very close proximity to the venue we had to attend for a wedding and the whole experience was positive. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Memorable and very safe Hotel. Extremely helpful staff's.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was good and location was good but the approach road was bit shabby. All the staff's across all elements of the hotel were exceptionally courteous and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Approach road to the Hotel was bit village type.

reviews.title: Staff hospitality, room cleanliness, new property and the restaurant food, whatever you order, it wi
reviews.positives: Top notch staff hospitality, room cleanliness and the restaurant food, whatever you order, it will be delicious.
